messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'guildMasterLog.length' and 'setGuildMasterLog'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [step, assignedClass, questions, guildMasterLog.length, setGuildMasterLog]

messages.message:
Error: Cannot call impure function during render

`Math.random` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent).

C:\Users\saroj\OneDrive\Documents\projects\Rizen\showcase\src\components\layout\ParticlesBackground.tsx:13:22
  11 |           className="particle" 
  12 |           style={{
> 13 |             left: `${Math.random() * 100}%`,
     |                      ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function
  14 |             top: `${Math.random() * 100}%`,
  15 |             animationDelay: `${Math.random() * 5}s`,
  16 |             animationDuration: `${5 + Math.random() * 10}s`

suggestions.desc: Remove the `\`. This maintains the current functionality.
Replace the `\` with `\\` to include the actual backslash character.
